summary: Iteration 36 - Label Dashboard for Label/Producer accounts. All backend endpoints and frontend UI elements verified and working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/label/dashboard returns 200 for authenticated user

Backend: GET /api/label/dashboard returns correct structure (total_artists, total_streams, total_revenue, total_releases, week_streams, platform_breakdown, country_breakdown, top_artists, recent_releases)
Backend: GET /api/label/dashboard requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: GET /api/label/artists returns 200 for authenticated user
Backend: GET /api/label/artists returns list of artists with stats (id, name, artist_name, email, plan, streams, revenue, releases, added_at)
Backend: GET /api/label/artists requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: POST /api/label/artists/invite returns 404 for non-existent email
Backend: POST /api/label/artists/invite returns 409 for duplicate artist
Backend: POST /api/label/artists/invite returns 400 for self-invite
Backend: POST /api/label/artists/invite requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: DELETE /api/label/artists/{artist_id} returns 404 for non-existent roster entry
Backend: DELETE /api/label/artists/{artist_id} requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: Full invite/remove flow works correctly (invite -> verify on roster -> remove -> verify removed)
Backend: platform_breakdown structure verified
Backend: country_breakdown structure verified
Backend: top_artists structure verified
Backend: recent_releases structure verified
Backend: Artist stats (streams, revenue, releases) returned correctly
Frontend: Label Dashboard page at /label renders correctly
Frontend: Label Dashboard shows 5 stat cards (Artists, Total Streams, Revenue, Releases, This Week)
Frontend: Label Dashboard shows 3 analytics panels (Platform Streams, Top Markets, Top Performers)
Frontend: Label Dashboard shows Artist Roster table with correct columns (Artist, Plan, Streams, Revenue, Releases, Added, Actions)
Frontend: Label Dashboard shows 'Add Artist' button that opens invite form
Frontend: Invite form has email input field and Add button
Frontend: Label Dashboard sidebar shows 'Label Dashboard' nav item for label_producer users
Frontend: Artist roster shows remove button (trash icon) for each artist
Frontend: Admin user (label_producer) has 1 artist on roster (John Doe)
critical_code_review_comments: Label Dashboard endpoints correctly aggregate data across all artists on the label's roster
DashboardLayout.jsx correctly conditionally renders Label Dashboard nav item only for user_role='label_producer'
LabelDashboardPage.jsx has proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Invite flow correctly validates: non-existent email (404), duplicate artist (409), self-invite (400)
Artist stats (streams, revenue, releases) are correctly aggregated from stream_events and releases collections
seed_data_creation: Admin user already has 1 artist on roster (John Doe, email: test_full_reg_1775233572@test.com)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 36 tested Label Dashboard feature for label_producer users. All 4 endpoints working: GET /api/label/dashboard (overview stats), GET /api/label/artists (roster list with stats), POST /api/label/artists/invite (add by email), DELETE /api/label/artists/{artist_id} (remove from roster). Frontend at /label shows 5 stat cards, 3 analytics panels, and artist roster table. Label Dashboard nav item only shows for users with user_role='label_producer'. Admin user has been set as label_producer and has 1 artist on roster.

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs. All endpoints are fully functional with real MongoDB data.

returns: artists array with id, name, artist_name, email, plan, streams, revenue, releases, added_at
